title: Senior Financial Analyst - India Ratings - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - India Ratings - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
India Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Ratings:
India Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
